initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Network of Anchorage
initiatives.description: A community-led network coordinating mutual aid and support initiatives throughout the Anchorage area. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building community power through collective action.

initiatives.name: Food for Thought Alaska
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food security through community-based food distribution in Anchorage. They coordinate food access programs, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective food distribution, community care, and creating equitable access to nourishment.

initiatives.name: Choosing Our Roots
initiatives.description: Queer-led and queer-focused nonprofit providing housing support and case management to queer, Alaskan youth and young adults experiencing housing insecurity and homelessness.

initiatives.name: The Party for Socialism and Liberation - Anchorage
